- **Package**:

## SLA Triage
- [ ] Critical (24h)
- [ ] High (1w)
- [ ] Medium (2w)
- [ ] Low (Next scheduled release)

## Remediation Plan
- [ ] Upgrade dependency version
- [ ] Apply code fix / workaround
- [ ] Document exception
